1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="coi-banner__headline" id="coiBannerHeadline"> Du kontrollerer dine egne data </h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>Lønn og ansettelse</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="menu-container menu-hidden"> <img alt="" aria-hidden="true" class="illustration" loading="lazy" src="/dist/illustrations/Menydame.svg"/> <div class="language-selector"> <div class="dropdow
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (15 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="coi-banner__policy" href="javascript:TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3');"> Les mer om informasjonskapsler </a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Du kan avvelge informasjonskapsler fra Google Analytics her</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/help/17442/windows-internet-explorer-delete-manage-cookies#ie=ie-11" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Internet Explorer</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://cookieinformation.com/" target="_blank">kontakte Cookie Information på deres nettside</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea aria-hidden="true" style='min-height: 0px !important; max-height: none !important; height: 0px !important; visibility: hidden !important; overflow: hidden !important; position: absolute !imp
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="g-recaptcha-response" id="g-recaptcha-response-100000" name="g-recaptcha-response" style="width: 250px; height: 40px; border: 1px solid rgb(193, 193, 193); margin: 10px 25px; padding:
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id

2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe style="display: none;"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Helse, miljø og sikkerhet - Arbeidstilsynet

https://www.arbeidstilsynet.no/hms/
Avvik: 143 | Bestått: 218

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="coi-banner__headline" id="coiBannerHeadline"> Du kontrollerer dine egne data </h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>Lønn og ansettelse</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Arbeidsmiljømodellen</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="menu-container menu-hidden"> <img alt="" aria-hidden="true" class="illustration" loading="lazy" src="/dist/illustrations/Menydame.svg"/> <div class="language-selector"> <div class="dropdow
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h2></h2>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (17 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="coi-banner__policy" href="javascript:TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3');"> Les mer om informasjonskapsler </a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Du kan avvelge informasjonskapsler fra Google Analytics her</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autocomplete="off" class="ohnohoney" id="name" name="name" placeholder="Your name here" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<textarea autocomplete="off" class="ohnohoney" id="feedback" name="feedback" placeholder="Type here" type="textarea"></textarea>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea aria-hidden="true" style='min-height: 0px !important; max-height: none !important; height: 0px !important; visibility: hidden !important; overflow: hidden !important; position: absolute !imp
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="coi-banner__headline" id="coiBannerHeadline"> Du kontrollerer dine egne data </h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>Lønn og ansettelse</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="menu-container menu-hidden"> <img alt="" aria-hidden="true" class="illustration" loading="lazy" src="/dist/illustrations/Menydame.svg"/> <div class="language-selector"> <div class="dropdow
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="pagination large"> <ul> <li> <a href="?&p=1#webinar"> <button aria-current="true" aria-label="Side 1" class="button tertiary-first" tabindex="-1"> 1
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (48 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="coi-banner__policy" href="javascript:TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3');"> Les mer om informasjonskapsler </a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Du kan avvelge informasjonskapsler fra Google Analytics her</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/help/17442/windows-internet-explorer-delete-manage-cookies#ie=ie-11" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Internet Explorer</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/help/4027947/microsoft-edge-delete-cookies" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Microsoft Edge</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://support.mozilla.org/en-US/kb/delete-cookies-remove-info-websites-stored" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Mozilla Firefox</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://support.google.com/chrome/answer/95647?hl=en" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Google Chrome</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a href="https://help.opera.com/en/latest/web-preferences/#cookies" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Opera</a>

MODERATE

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="coi-banner__headline" id="coiBannerHeadline"> Du kontrollerer dine egne data </h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>Lønn og ansettelse</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Arbeidsgivers plikter</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="menu-container menu-hidden"> <img alt="" aria-hidden="true" class="illustration" loading="lazy" src="/dist/illustrations/Menydame.svg"/> <div class="language-selector"> <div class="dropdow
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (17 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="coi-banner__policy" href="javascript:TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3');"> Les mer om informasjonskapsler </a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Du kan avvelge informasjonskapsler fra Google Analytics her</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/help/17442/windows-internet-explorer-delete-manage-cookies#ie=ie-11" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Internet Explorer</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/help/4027947/microsoft-edge-delete-cookies" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Microsoft Edge</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://support.mozilla.org/en-US/kb/delete-cookies-remove-info-websites-stored" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Mozilla Firefox</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://support.google.com/chrome/answer/95647?hl=en" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Google Chrome</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://help.opera.com/en/latest/web-preferences/#cookies" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Opera</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://support.apple.com/en-us/HT201265" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Safari</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement

Link text is very long (166 characters)

<a class="navigation-entry-link" href="https://arbeidsmiljohjelpen.arbeidstilsynet.no/" rel="noreferrer noopener" target=""> <div class="card card--color-transparent navigation-entry"> <picture><sourc
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive

Link text is very long (138 characters)

Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autocomplete="off" class="ohnohoney" id="name" name="name" placeholder="Your name here" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<textarea autocomplete="off" class="ohnohoney" id="feedback" name="feedback" placeholder="Type here" type="textarea"></textarea>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea aria-hidden="true" style='min-height: 0px !important; max-height: none !important; height: 0px !important; visibility: hidden !important; overflow: hidden !important; position: absolute !imp
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="g-recaptcha-response" id="g-recaptcha-response-100000" name="g-recaptcha-response" style="width: 250px; height: 40px; border: 1px solid rgb(193, 193, 193); margin: 10px 25px; padding:
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (8 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button aria-controls="coiConsentBannerCategoriesWrapper" aria-expanded="true" id="hide_details" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="-1"> Skjul detaljer </button>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state

2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe style="display: none;"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Asbest - Arbeidstilsynet

https://www.arbeidstilsynet.no/risikofylt-arbeid/kjemikalier/asbest/
Avvik: 160 | Bestått: 275
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (115 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="coi-banner__headline" id="coiBannerHeadline"> Du kontrollerer dine egne data </h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>Lønn og ansettelse</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="menu-container menu-hidden"> <img alt="" aria-hidden="true" class="illustration" loading="lazy" src="/dist/illustrations/Menydame.svg"/> <div class="language-selector"> <div class="dropdow
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (15 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="coi-banner__policy" href="javascript:TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3');"> Les mer om informasjonskapsler </a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Du kan avvelge informasjonskapsler fra Google Analytics her</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/help/17442/windows-internet-explorer-delete-manage-cookies#ie=ie-11" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Internet Explorer</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

<a class="coi-renew-link" href="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();">Du endrer samtykket ditt ved å klikke her</a>

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autocomplete="off" class="ohnohoney" id="name" name="name" placeholder="Your name here" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<textarea autocomplete="off" class="ohnohoney" id="feedback" name="feedback" placeholder="Type here" type="textarea"></textarea>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea aria-hidden="true" style='min-height: 0px !important; max-height: none !important; height: 0px !important; visibility: hidden !important; overflow: hidden !important; position: absolute !imp
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="g-recaptcha-response" id="g-recaptcha-response-100000" name="g-recaptcha-response" style="width: 250px; height: 40px; border: 1px solid rgb(193, 193, 193); margin: 10px 25px; padding:
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (8 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button aria-controls="coiConsentBannerCategoriesWrapper" aria-expanded="true" id="hide_details" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="-1"> Skjul detaljer </button>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button aria-controls="description-container-cookie_cat_necessary" aria-expanded="false" class="coi-consent-banner__category-name" onclick="toggleCookieDetails(this,'description-container-cookie_cat_n
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state

SERIOUS

Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state

SERIOUS

Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state

SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button aria-controls="description-container-cookie_cat_marketing" aria-expanded="false" class="coi-consent-banner__category-name" onclick="toggleCookieDetails(this,'description-container-cookie_cat_m
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button class="coi-banner__decline" id="updateButton" onclick="CookieInformation.submitConsent()" tabindex="-1"> Lagre innstillinger </button>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input class="coi__checkbox" data-index="-1" disabled="" id="cookie_cat_necessary" name="cookie_cat_necessary" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive textarea has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<textarea aria-hidden="true" style='min-height: 0px !important; max-height: none !important; height: 0px !important; visibility: hidden !important; overflow: hidden !important; position: absolute !imp
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (14 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe style="display: none;"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='region' needs an accessible name

<div class="accordion-item__content" hidden="" id="80421" role="region"> <h3>Lungekreft</h3> <p>Alle typer lungekreft kan i utgangspunktet være relatert til asbesteksponering.</p> <p>Risiko for lungek
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='region' needs an accessible name

<div class="accordion-item__content" hidden="" id="84708" role="region"> <h3>Pleuraplakk</h3> <p>Pleuraplakk er fortykninger av lungesekken (pleura) på innsiden av brystkassen eller over mellomgulvet.
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='region' needs an accessible name

<div class="accordion-item__content" hidden="" id="66628" role="region"> <p>I forskrift om tiltaks- og grenseverdier er grenseverdien satt til 0,01 fiber/cm<sup>3</sup> (tilsvarer 10 000 fibre/m<sup>3
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='region' needs an accessible name

<div class="accordion-item__content" hidden="" id="88875" role="region"> <p>Siden håndtering av asbest er forbudt, skal asbestfibre i luft normalt ikke forekomme i andre situasjoner enn ved sanering.
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='region' needs an accessible name

<div class="accordion-item__content" hidden="" id="51554" role="region"> <p>Etter at saneringsarbeid er utført, bør konsentrasjonen av asbestfibre ikke overstige Folkehelseinstituttets norm på 0,001 f
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='region' needs an accessible name

<div class="accordion-item__content" hidden="" id="46058" role="region"> <p>Virksomheter som skal arbeide med asbestholdige produkter, må søke tillatelse fra Arbeidstilsynet. Dette gjelder rivning, re
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='region' needs an accessible name

<div class="accordion-item__content" hidden="" id="64316" role="region"> <p>Alle arbeidsgivere har plikt til å kartlegge og risikovurdere om det forekommer asbestmateriale i egne bygg og i bygg der de

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="coi-banner__headline" id="coiBannerHeadline"> Du kontrollerer dine egne data </h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>Lønn og ansettelse</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="menu-container menu-hidden"> <img alt="" aria-hidden="true" class="illustration" loading="lazy" src="/dist/illustrations/Menydame.svg"/> <div class="language-selector"> <div class="dropdow
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h2></h2>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (22 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="coi-banner__policy" href="javascript:TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3');"> Les mer om informasjonskapsler </a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Du kan avvelge informasjonskapsler fra Google Analytics her</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/help/17442/windows-internet-explorer-delete-manage-cookies#ie=ie-11" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Internet Explorer</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/help/4027947/microsoft-edge-delete-cookies" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Microsoft Edge</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://support.mozilla.org/en-US/kb/delete-cookies-remove-info-websites-stored" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Mozilla Firefox</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://support.google.com/chrome/answer/95647?hl=en" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Google Chrome</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://help.opera.com/en/latest/web-preferences/#cookies" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Opera</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="coi-banner__headline" id="coiBannerHeadline"> Du kontrollerer dine egne data </h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>Lønn og ansettelse</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="menu-container menu-hidden"> <img alt="" aria-hidden="true" class="illustration" loading="lazy" src="/dist/illustrations/Menydame.svg"/> <div class="language-selector"> <div class="dropdow
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (15 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="coi-banner__policy" href="javascript:TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3');"> Les mer om informasjonskapsler </a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Du kan avvelge informasjonskapsler fra Google Analytics her</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/help/17442/windows-internet-explorer-delete-manage-cookies#ie=ie-11" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Internet Explorer</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autocomplete="off" class="ohnohoney" id="name" name="name" placeholder="Your name here" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<textarea autocomplete="off" class="ohnohoney" id="feedback" name="feedback" placeholder="Type here" type="textarea"></textarea>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea aria-hidden="true" style='min-height: 0px !important; max-height: none !important; height: 0px !important; visibility: hidden !important; overflow: hidden !important; position: absolute !imp
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="g-recaptcha-response" id="g-recaptcha-response-100000" name="g-recaptcha-response" style="width: 250px; height: 40px; border: 1px solid rgb(193, 193, 193); margin: 10px 25px; padding:
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (8 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button aria-controls="coiConsentBannerCategoriesWrapper" aria-expanded="true" id="hide_details" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="-1"> Skjul detaljer </button>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

SERIOUS

Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state

SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe style="display: none;"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Arbeid i høyden - Arbeidstilsynet

https://www.arbeidstilsynet.no/risikofylt-arbeid/arbeid-i-hoyden/

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="coi-banner__headline" id="coiBannerHeadline"> Du kontrollerer dine egne data </h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>Lønn og ansettelse</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="menu-container menu-hidden"> <img alt="" aria-hidden="true" class="illustration" loading="lazy" src="/dist/illustrations/Menydame.svg"/> <div class="language-selector"> <div class="dropdow
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (16 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="coi-banner__policy" href="javascript:TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3');"> Les mer om informasjonskapsler </a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Du kan avvelge informasjonskapsler fra Google Analytics her</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/help/17442/windows-internet-explorer-delete-manage-cookies#ie=ie-11" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Internet Explorer</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/help/4027947/microsoft-edge-delete-cookies" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Microsoft Edge</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://support.mozilla.org/en-US/kb/delete-cookies-remove-info-websites-stored" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Mozilla Firefox</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://support.google.com/chrome/answer/95647?hl=en" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Google Chrome</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://help.opera.com/en/latest/web-preferences/#cookies" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Opera</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a href="https://support.apple.com/en-us/HT201265" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Safari</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

Link text is very long (121 characters)

<a class="link" href="/regelverk/forskrifter/forskrift-om-organisering-ledelse-og-medvirkning//#85741">Planlegging, tilrettelegging av arbeidet og sikker drift, kapittel 10 i forskrift om organisering
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autocomplete="off" class="ohnohoney" id="name" name="name" placeholder="Your name here" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<textarea autocomplete="off" class="ohnohoney" id="feedback" name="feedback" placeholder="Type here" type="textarea"></textarea>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea aria-hidden="true" style='min-height: 0px !important; max-height: none !important; height: 0px !important; visibility: hidden !important; overflow: hidden !important; position: absolute !imp
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id

CRITICAL

Form input has no label

Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="coi-banner__headline" id="coiBannerHeadline"> Du kontrollerer dine egne data </h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>Lønn og ansettelse</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Arbeid i eller på tanker, rørledninger, rom o. l.</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="menu-container menu-hidden"> <img alt="" aria-hidden="true" class="illustration" loading="lazy" src="/dist/illustrations/Menydame.svg"/> <div class="language-selector"> <div class="dropdow
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (15 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="coi-banner__policy" href="javascript:TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3');"> Les mer om informasjonskapsler </a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Du kan avvelge informasjonskapsler fra Google Analytics her</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autocomplete="off" class="ohnohoney" id="name" name="name" placeholder="Your name here" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<textarea autocomplete="off" class="ohnohoney" id="feedback" name="feedback" placeholder="Type here" type="textarea"></textarea>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea aria-hidden="true" style='min-height: 0px !important; max-height: none !important; height: 0px !important; visibility: hidden !important; overflow: hidden !important; position: absolute !imp
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="g-recaptcha-response" id="g-recaptcha-response-100000" name="g-recaptcha-response" style="width: 250px; height: 40px; border: 1px solid rgb(193, 193, 193); margin: 10px 25px; padding:
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (8 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button aria-controls="coiConsentBannerCategoriesWrapper" aria-expanded="true" id="hide_details" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="-1"> Skjul detaljer </button>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state

2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe style="display: none;"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Arbeidsmiljø - Arbeidstilsynet

https://www.arbeidstilsynet.no/arbeidsmiljo/
Avvik: 153 | Bestått: 240
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (118 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background: new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x="0px" xml:space="preserve" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="coi-banner__headline" id="coiBannerHeadline"> Du kontrollerer dine egne data </h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>Lønn og ansettelse</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Ambulansestasjoner – krav til arbeidslokaler og arbeidstøy</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="menu-container menu-hidden"> <img alt="" aria-hidden="true" class="illustration" loading="lazy" src="/dist/illustrations/Menydame.svg"/> <div class="language-selector"> <div class="dropdow
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (17 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="coi-banner__policy" href="javascript:TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3');"> Les mer om informasjonskapsler </a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Du kan avvelge informasjonskapsler fra Google Analytics her</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autocomplete="off" class="ohnohoney" id="name" name="name" placeholder="Your name here" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<textarea autocomplete="off" class="ohnohoney" id="feedback" name="feedback" placeholder="Type here" type="textarea"></textarea>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea aria-hidden="true" style='min-height: 0px !important; max-height: none !important; height: 0px !important; visibility: hidden !important; overflow: hidden !important; position: absolute !imp
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="g-recaptcha-response" id="g-recaptcha-response-100000" name="g-recaptcha-response" style="width: 250px; height: 40px; border: 1px solid rgb(193, 193, 193); margin: 10px 25px; padding:
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id

SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button aria-controls="coiConsentBannerCategoriesWrapper" aria-expanded="true" id="hide_details" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="-1"> Skjul detaljer </button>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="coi-banner__headline" id="coiBannerHeadline"> Du kontrollerer dine egne data </h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>Lønn og ansettelse</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Ledige stillinger</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="menu-container menu-hidden"> <img alt="" aria-hidden="true" class="illustration" loading="lazy" src="/dist/illustrations/Menydame.svg"/> <div class="language-selector"> <div class="dropdow
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (15 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="coi-banner__policy" href="javascript:TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3');"> Les mer om informasjonskapsler </a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Du kan avvelge informasjonskapsler fra Google Analytics her</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autocomplete="off" class="ohnohoney" id="name" name="name" placeholder="Your name here" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<textarea autocomplete="off" class="ohnohoney" id="feedback" name="feedback" placeholder="Type here" type="textarea"></textarea>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea aria-hidden="true" style='min-height: 0px !important; max-height: none !important; height: 0px !important; visibility: hidden !important; overflow: hidden !important; position: absolute !imp
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="g-recaptcha-response" id="g-recaptcha-response-100000" name="g-recaptcha-response" style="width: 250px; height: 40px; border: 1px solid rgb(193, 193, 193); margin: 10px 25px; padding:
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (8 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button aria-controls="coiConsentBannerCategoriesWrapper" aria-expanded="true" id="hide_details" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="-1"> Skjul detaljer </button>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'main' appears 2 times

id="main"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe style="display: none;"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Tilsyn - Arbeidstilsynet

https://www.arbeidstilsynet.no/om-oss/tilsyn/
Avvik: 148 | Bestått: 251

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="coi-banner__headline" id="coiBannerHeadline"> Du kontrollerer dine egne data </h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>Lønn og ansettelse</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="menu-container menu-hidden"> <img alt="" aria-hidden="true" class="illustration" loading="lazy" src="/dist/illustrations/Menydame.svg"/> <div class="language-selector"> <div class="dropdow
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (15 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="coi-banner__policy" href="javascript:TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3');"> Les mer om informasjonskapsler </a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Du kan avvelge informasjonskapsler fra Google Analytics her</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/help/17442/windows-internet-explorer-delete-manage-cookies#ie=ie-11" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Internet Explorer</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

MODERATE

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://cookieinformation.com/" target="_blank">kontakte Cookie Information på deres nettside</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autocomplete="off" class="ohnohoney" id="name" name="name" placeholder="Your name here" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<textarea autocomplete="off" class="ohnohoney" id="feedback" name="feedback" placeholder="Type here" type="textarea"></textarea>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea aria-hidden="true" style='min-height: 0px !important; max-height: none !important; height: 0px !important; visibility: hidden !important; overflow: hidden !important; position: absolute !imp
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="g-recaptcha-response" id="g-recaptcha-response-100000" name="g-recaptcha-response" style="width: 250px; height: 40px; border: 1px solid rgb(193, 193, 193); margin: 10px 25px; padding:
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (8 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button aria-controls="coiConsentBannerCategoriesWrapper" aria-expanded="true" id="hide_details" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="-1"> Skjul detaljer </button>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state

SERIOUS

SERIOUS

Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.1 Parsing (3 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'main' appears 2 times

id="main"
Each ID must be unique on the page
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: '3' appears 2 times

id="3"
Each ID must be unique on the page
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: '_com_1' appears 2 times

id="_com_1"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (11 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe style="display: none;"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='region' needs an accessible name

<ul class="accordion-item__content content-menu__list" hidden="" id="ContentMenu" role="region"> <li class="content-menu__list__item"> <a class="content-menu__list__item__text" href="/om-oss/tilsyn/#u
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='region' needs an accessible name

<div class="accordion-item__content" hidden="" id="76519" role="region"> <p>Ved meldte tilsyn sender vi virksomheten en «melding om tilsyn» i et brev. Brevet gir informasjon om hva som er hensikten me
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

MODERATE

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="coi-banner__headline" id="coiBannerHeadline"> Du kontrollerer dine egne data </h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>Lønn og ansettelse</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="menu-container menu-hidden"> <img alt="" aria-hidden="true" class="illustration" loading="lazy" src="/dist/illustrations/Menydame.svg"/> <div class="language-selector"> <div class="dropdow
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (15 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="coi-banner__policy" href="javascript:TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3');"> Les mer om informasjonskapsler </a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Du kan avvelge informasjonskapsler fra Google Analytics her</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/help/17442/windows-internet-explorer-delete-manage-cookies#ie=ie-11" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Internet Explorer</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autocomplete="off" class="ohnohoney" id="name" name="name" placeholder="Your name here" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<textarea autocomplete="off" class="ohnohoney" id="feedback" name="feedback" placeholder="Type here" type="textarea"></textarea>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea aria-hidden="true" style='min-height: 0px !important; max-height: none !important; height: 0px !important; visibility: hidden !important; overflow: hidden !important; position: absolute !imp
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="g-recaptcha-response" id="g-recaptcha-response-100000" name="g-recaptcha-response" style="width: 250px; height: 40px; border: 1px solid rgb(193, 193, 193); margin: 10px 25px; padding:
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (8 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button aria-controls="coiConsentBannerCategoriesWrapper" aria-expanded="true" id="hide_details" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="-1"> Skjul detaljer </button>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state

Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state

SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button class="coi-banner__decline" id="updateButton" onclick="CookieInformation.submitConsent()" tabindex="-1"> Lagre innstillinger </button>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input class="coi__checkbox" data-index="-1" disabled="" id="cookie_cat_necessary" name="cookie_cat_necessary" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state

SERIOUS

Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe style="display: none;"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Tips oss - Arbeidstilsynet

https://www.arbeidstilsynet.no/kontakt-oss/tips/
Avvik: 138 | Bestått: 208

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="coi-banner__headline" id="coiBannerHeadline"> Du kontrollerer dine egne data </h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>Lønn og ansettelse</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="menu-container menu-hidden"> <img alt="" aria-hidden="true" class="illustration" loading="lazy" src="/dist/illustrations/Menydame.svg"/> <div class="language-selector"> <div class="dropdow
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (15 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="coi-banner__policy" href="javascript:TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3');"> Les mer om informasjonskapsler </a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Du kan avvelge informasjonskapsler fra Google Analytics her</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/help/17442/windows-internet-explorer-delete-manage-cookies#ie=ie-11" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Internet Explorer</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autocomplete="off" class="ohnohoney" id="name" name="name" placeholder="Your name here" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<textarea autocomplete="off" class="ohnohoney" id="feedback" name="feedback" placeholder="Type here" type="textarea"></textarea>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea aria-hidden="true" style='min-height: 0px !important; max-height: none !important; height: 0px !important; visibility: hidden !important; overflow: hidden !important; position: absolute !imp
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="g-recaptcha-response" id="g-recaptcha-response-100000" name="g-recaptcha-response" style="width: 250px; height: 40px; border: 1px solid rgb(193, 193, 193); margin: 10px 25px; padding:
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (8 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button aria-controls="coiConsentBannerCategoriesWrapper" aria-expanded="true" id="hide_details" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="-1"> Skjul detaljer </button>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state

SERIOUS

SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state

SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state

2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'main' appears 2 times

id="main"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (7 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe style="display: none;"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='region' needs an accessible name

<div class="accordion-item__content" hidden="" id="44623" role="region"> <p>Du kan tipse Arbeidstilsynet om saker og forhold du mener er kritikkverdige på både din egen og andre arbeidsplasser.</p> <p
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='region' needs an accessible name

<div class="accordion-item__content" hidden="" id="43933" role="region"> <p>Dersom du er vitne til farer eller problemer i arbeidsmiljøet, skal du som hovedregel først varsle internt, oftest til den n
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='region' needs an accessible name

<div class="accordion-item__content" hidden="" id="15838" role="region"> <p>Noen av tipsene vi mottar, er av privatrettslig karakter. At noe er av privatrettslig karakter, betyr at det er en sak mello
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='region' needs an accessible name

<div class="accordion-item__content" hidden="" id="49504" role="region"> <p>Når du sender et tips eller varsel via tipsløsningen, kan du velge om du vil være anonym. </p> <p>Uansett om du vil være ano
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='region' needs an accessible name

<div class="accordion-item__content" hidden="" id="42325" role="region"> <p>Arbeidstilsynet registrerer alle tips og varsel vi mottar. Vi vurderer om vi skal følge opp, og i så fall hvordan vi skal fø
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='region' needs an accessible name

<div class="accordion-item__content" hidden="" id="83451" role="region"> <p>Arbeidstilsynet har taushetsplikt om hvem som tipser oss om mulig ulovlige forhold. Taushetsplikten gjør at du i utgangspunk
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

Arbeidslyst: En podkast fra Arbeidstilsynet

https://www.arbeidstilsynet.no/podkast/

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="coi-banner__headline" id="coiBannerHeadline"> Du kontrollerer dine egne data </h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>Lønn og ansettelse</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="menu-container menu-hidden"> <img alt="" aria-hidden="true" class="illustration" loading="lazy" src="/dist/illustrations/Menydame.svg"/> <div class="language-selector"> <div class="dropdow
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (15 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="coi-banner__policy" href="javascript:TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3');"> Les mer om informasjonskapsler </a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Du kan avvelge informasjonskapsler fra Google Analytics her</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/help/17442/windows-internet-explorer-delete-manage-cookies#ie=ie-11" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Internet Explorer</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/help/4027947/microsoft-edge-delete-cookies" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Microsoft Edge</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autocomplete="off" class="ohnohoney" id="name" name="name" placeholder="Your name here" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<textarea autocomplete="off" class="ohnohoney" id="feedback" name="feedback" placeholder="Type here" type="textarea"></textarea>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea aria-hidden="true" style='min-height: 0px !important; max-height: none !important; height: 0px !important; visibility: hidden !important; overflow: hidden !important; position: absolute !imp
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="g-recaptcha-response" id="g-recaptcha-response-100000" name="g-recaptcha-response" style="width: 250px; height: 40px; border: 1px solid rgb(193, 193, 193); margin: 10px 25px; padding:
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id

Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'main' appears 2 times

id="main"
Each ID must be unique on the page

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="coi-banner__headline" id="coiBannerHeadline"> Du kontrollerer dine egne data </h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>Lønn og ansettelse</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="menu-container menu-hidden"> <img alt="" aria-hidden="true" class="illustration" loading="lazy" src="/dist/illustrations/Menydame.svg"/> <div class="language-selector"> <div class="dropdow
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (15 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="coi-banner__policy" href="javascript:TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3');"> Les mer om informasjonskapsler </a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Du kan avvelge informasjonskapsler fra Google Analytics her</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/help/17442/windows-internet-explorer-delete-manage-cookies#ie=ie-11" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Internet Explorer</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/help/4027947/microsoft-edge-delete-cookies" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Microsoft Edge</a>

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="coi-renew-link" href="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();">Du endrer samtykket ditt ved å klikke her</a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

<a href="https://cookieinformation.com/" target="_blank">kontakte Cookie Information på deres nettside</a>

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autocomplete="off" class="ohnohoney" id="name" name="name" placeholder="Your name here" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<textarea autocomplete="off" class="ohnohoney" id="feedback" name="feedback" placeholder="Type here" type="textarea"></textarea>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea aria-hidden="true" style='min-height: 0px !important; max-height: none !important; height: 0px !important; visibility: hidden !important; overflow: hidden !important; position: absolute !imp
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="g-recaptcha-response" id="g-recaptcha-response-100000" name="g-recaptcha-response" style="width: 250px; height: 40px; border: 1px solid rgb(193, 193, 193); margin: 10px 25px; padding:
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (8 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button aria-controls="coiConsentBannerCategoriesWrapper" aria-expanded="true" id="hide_details" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="-1"> Skjul detaljer </button>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button aria-controls="description-container-cookie_cat_necessary" aria-expanded="false" class="coi-consent-banner__category-name" onclick="toggleCookieDetails(this,'description-container-cookie_cat_n
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state

SERIOUS

<button class="coi-banner__decline" id="updateButton" onclick="CookieInformation.submitConsent()" tabindex="-1"> Lagre innstillinger </button>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state

SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input class="coi__checkbox" data-index="-1" disabled="" id="cookie_cat_necessary" name="cookie_cat_necessary" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state

SERIOUS

Interactive textarea has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<textarea aria-hidden="true" style='min-height: 0px !important; max-height: none !important; height: 0px !important; visibility: hidden !important; overflow: hidden !important; position: absolute !imp
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (6 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe style="display: none;"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='region' needs an accessible name

<div class="accordion-item__content" hidden="" id="6569" role="region"> <p>Du skal ha full lønn for 1. og 17. mai dersom du i utgangspunktet skulle ha vært på arbeid og du har vært ansatt hos arbeidsg
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

MODERATE

Element with role='region' needs an accessible name

<div class="accordion-item__content" hidden="" id="54783" role="region"> <p>Hvis du har ferie på 1. og 17. mai, har du rett på lønn for disse dagene. Du kan kreve å forlenge ferien din dersom 1. eller
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='region' needs an accessible name

Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

<div class="accordion-item__content" hidden="" id="82613" role="region"> <p>En trekkavtale er en avtale mellom arbeidsgiver og arbeidstaker om en konkret situasjon som kan gi grunnlag for trekk, for e
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

MODERATE

Element with role='region' needs an accessible name

<div class="accordion-item__content" hidden="" id="65272" role="region"> <p>Arbeidsgiver kan trekke uten samtykke eller domsavgjørelse hvis arbeidstaker forlater jobben i strid med regelverk og arbeid
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

Testreglene er basert på UU-tilsynets offisielle testregler

🔄 Start ny skanning

https://arbeidstilsynet.no/nord
1-500

Kopier kommandoen:

python checker.py https://arbeidstilsynet.no/nord --max-pages 16 --format html
